[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 100001111 5
5 111101111 8
6 011111111 8
7 011111010 6

12 110011111 7
23 111110000 5

56 101110101 6

70 000011101 4

01 12x
